markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 587

“Stop or stopping” when prohibited shall mean any cessation of movement of a vehicle, whether occupied or not, except when necessary to avoid conflict with other traffic or in compliance with the direction of a police officer or official traffic control device or signal.

*(Added by Stats. 1961, Ch. 1917.)*

subsections.text: “Stop or stopping” when prohibited shall mean any cessation of movement of a vehicle, whether occupied or not, except when necessary to avoid conflict with other traffic or in compliance with the direction of a police officer or official traffic control device or signal.
